name: Jupiler
description: Jupiler is one of Belgium's most popular beers. It's a blond lager with a light, refreshing flavor, perfect for moments of conviviality. Its low bitterness and slightly malty taste make it an easy-drinking beer.

beers_flavors.taste: Malt, hops, fruity, fine bitterness
beers_flavors.visual: Pale blond, clear, white foam

name: Barbar
description: Barbar is an artisanal Belgian lager brewed with honey, giving it a unique sweetness and aroma. It offers a perfect balance between the malty flavor and the floral notes of honey. On the palate, it is rich and slightly spicy, ideal for lovers of special beers.

beers_flavors.taste: Malt, Honey, Spices, Floral
beers_flavors.visual: Blonde, orange, creamy head

name: Cuvée des Trolls
description: Cuvée des Trolls is a refreshing, lightly hopped blonde ale with notes of citrus and exotic fruit. It is much appreciated for its balanced taste and lightness. Perfect for aperitifs with friends, it seduces with its unique character and playful image.

beers_flavors.taste: Fruity, slightly spicy, a little bitter
beers_flavors.visual: Blonde, cloudy, abundant foam

name: Duvel
description: Duvel is a strong Belgian blonde ale, famous for its powerful, refined taste. With its fruity aromas and slight bitterness, it offers a unique tasting experience. Its special fermentation process gives it a beautiful head and pleasant fizz.

beers_flavors.smell: Spices, hops, floral, fruity, yeast, citrus notes
beers_flavors.taste: Round, generous, powerful, spicy, full-bodied, lemony notes, yeast, clean bitterness, floral
beers_flavors.visual: Clear golden color, generous white foam

name: Hoegaarden Rosée
description: Hoegaarden Rosée is a fruity white beer infused with raspberries, giving it a rosy color and a sweet, refreshing taste. It's light and slightly sweet, perfect for a summer break. With its red fruit aromas and low alcohol content, it's ideal for those looking for something different.

beers_flavors.taste: Red fruit and sugar flavors
beers_flavors.visual: Pink color, thick foam

name: Kaasteel Red
description: Kasteel Rouge is a unique Belgian beer, brewed with macerated cherries, giving it a deep red color and a sweet-fruity taste. It's rich and intense, perfect for lovers of beers with complex flavors. With its aromas of red fruits and a slight touch of bitterness, it's easy to enjoy.

beers_flavors.smell: Intense aromas of cherries, candied cherries, caramel, sweetness, pastry notes
beers_flavors.taste: Soft, sweet, round, gourmand, intense cherry notes, caramel, slight acidity, warm finish
beers_flavors.visual: Red color, ruby highlights, opaque, creamy pink foam

name: Kriek
description: Kriek is a traditional Belgian beer brewed with cherries, offering a bright ruby-red color and intense fruity taste. Its sweetness and balanced acidity make it a refreshing and unique beer. With its cherry aromas and light fizz, it's perfect for lovers of fruity beers.

beers_flavors.taste: Intense morello cherry notes, tart, woody, vegetal notes, soft, sweet
beers_flavors.visual: Veiled red color, generous pink foam

name: Leffe Blonde
description: Leffe Blonde is a well-known Belgian abbey beer, with a golden color and aromas of ripe fruit and malt. It is smooth and well-balanced, with a slight bitterness and a delicately spicy finish.

beers_flavors.taste: Flavors of caramel, spice, fruit and yeast
beers_flavors.visual: Golden color, white foam

name: Leffe Brune
description: Leffe Brune is a Belgian abbey beer with a rich, complex taste, with notes of caramel, dried fruit and roasted malt. It's smooth and slightly sweet, ideal for accompanying tasty dishes or relaxing after a long day. With its dark brown color and creamy foam, it offers a unique tasting experience.

beers_flavors.smell: Aromas of roasted malt, coffee, chocolate and caramel
beers_flavors.taste: Gourmet flavors of caramel, chocolate, coffee and toast
beers_flavors.visual: Amber color, mahogany highlights, beige foam

name: Maredsous 10 Triple
description: Maredsous 10 Triple is a golden-colored Belgian abbey beer known for its strength and rich aroma. It offers complex flavors of ripe fruit, honey and spices, with a pleasant bitterness on the finish. It's a tasting beer, perfect for connoisseurs in search of new sensations.

beers_flavors.smell: Aromas of spices, caramel, toast, malt, dried fruit, raisins, yeast.
beers_flavors.taste: Round, powerful, warm, caramelized flavors, toast, dried fruit, spices, long, full-bodied finish
beers_flavors.visual: Deep orange color, thick, creamy white head

name: Pêcheresse
description: Pêcheresse is a fruity Belgian beer brewed with peaches, offering a golden color and a deliciously sweet, refreshing taste. It combines the sweetness of fruit with a light acidity, creating a unique tasting experience. Perfect for those who appreciate light, fruity beers.

beers_flavors.taste: Light and tangy, intense peach flavors, sweet and sour, lively
beers_flavors.visual: Orange-blonde colour, white foam

name: Rochefort 8
description: Rochefort 8 is a rich, complex, dark-brown Belgian Trappist beer. It has aromas of ripe fruit, caramel and spices, with a round mouthfeel. It's a full-bodied, refined beer, perfect for lovers of robust beers.

beers_flavors.smell: Aromas of malts, toast, fruit, spices
beers_flavors.taste: Flavors of chocolate, toast, vanilla, dark fruits, spices
beers_flavors.visual: Brown color, ruby highlights, creamy beige head

name: Tripel Karmeliet
description: Tripel Karmeliet is an exceptional Belgian beer, brewed with three cereals: barley, wheat and oats. It offers complex aromas of vanilla, fruit and spices, with a creamy head. On the palate, it is both smooth and full-bodied, perfect for lovers of rich, aromatic beers.

beers_flavors.smell: Aromas of malt, toast, spices, fruit, honey
beers_flavors.taste: Round, generous, sweet, spicy, yeasty, fruity, honey, malt, toast
beers_flavors.visual: Golden blond color, slightly cloudy, creamy white foam

name: Westmalle Triple
description: Westmalle Triple is a world-renowned Belgian Trappist beer, known for its golden color and fruity, spicy aromas. It offers a complex taste with notes of malt, yeast and balanced bitterness. It's a powerful, refreshing beer, perfect for lovers of rich, aromatic beers.

beers_flavors.smell: Fruity aromas, orange, grapefruit, hops, yeast, citrus, spices, floral notes
beers_flavors.taste: Full-bodied and flavorful, spicy notes, fruit, orange, grapefruit, yeast, herbaceous and floral notes, long finish
beers_flavors.visual: Golden blond color, slightly cloudy, generous white head

name: La Chouffe
description: La Chouffe is an unfiltered Belgian blonde ale with fruity, spicy aromas and a fine head. It offers soft flavors of malt, coriander and hops, with a slight bitterness on the finish. Perfect for those who like rich, balanced beers.

beers_flavors.taste: Powerful, full-bodied, fruity notes, citrus, spices, hops, coriander, slight bitterness.
beers_flavors.visual: Blonde, golden, slightly cloudy, creamy white foam

name: Vedette IPA
description: Vedette IPA is a hoppy Belgian beer with intense aromas of tropical fruit and resin. Its bitter, refreshing taste is perfectly balanced by notes of malt. It's ideal for lovers of hoppy, richly-flavored beers.

beers_flavors.smell: Malty aromas, caramel, hops, fruit, floral notes
beers_flavors.taste: Notes of exotic fruit, citrus, caramel, floral notes, mild bitterness
beers_flavors.visual: Amber color, copper highlights, slightly cloudy, fine white foam

name: Kwak
description: Kwak is an iconic Belgian beer, with a beautiful amber color and aromas of caramel and malt. It has a sweet, slightly spicy flavor, with a slight bitterness on the finish.

beers_flavors.smell: Malty, caramelized aromas, dried fruits, spices, toast.
beers_flavors.taste: Powerful, dry, notes of spices, caramel, toast, dried fruit, slightly bitter finish
beers_flavors.visual: Amber color, copper highlights, limpid, creamy white mousse

name: Chimay Bleue
description: Chimay Bleue is a renowned Trappist beer, rich in aromas and flavors. It is a dark beer with notes of caramel, ripe fruit and chocolate. It is full-bodied and complex, ideal for those seeking an intense tasting experience.

beers_flavors.taste: Alcohol, sugar, slight bitterness, round, smooth, malt, caramel
beers_flavors.visual: Dark brown, limpid, fine beige foam

name: Gueuze
description: Gueuze is a unique Belgian beer made from a blend of young and old lambics. Its tangy taste and complex fruit and wood aromas make it a refreshing and unique tasting experience. It is distinguished by its spontaneous fermentation, offering authentic and varied flavors.

beers_flavors.taste: Sour, acidic, yeasty
beers_flavors.visual: Golden yellow, light white foam

name: Paix Dieu
description: La Paix Dieu is a Belgian Triple craft beer, brewed exclusively on the nights of the full moon, giving it a mystical aura. It has complex aromas of ripe fruit, honey and spices, with a creamy head. On the palate, it is rich and balanced, with a slight bitterness at the end.

beers_flavors.smell: Aromas of fruit, spices, coriander, yeast, hops, malt, vanilla.
beers_flavors.taste: Powerful, smooth, spicy notes, coriander, fruit, toast, yeast, subtle, warm hop finish
beers_flavors.visual: Cloudy golden color, abundant creamy mousse

name: Delta IPA
description: Delta IPA is a Belgian hoppy beer with exotic tropical fruit and citrus aromas. Its refreshing, bitter flavor is balanced by subtle malty notes. Ideal for lovers of richly flavored, well-hopped beers.

beers_flavors.smell: Aromas of hops. Notes of citrus and resin.
beers_flavors.taste: Tropical fruit and lychee flavors. Notes of hops
beers_flavors.visual: Blonde with golden highlights. Attractive white foam.

name: Duvel Triple Hop Citra
description: Duvel Triple Hop Citra is a hopped variation of the famous Duvel, using Citra hops to add tropical and citrus aromas. It offers balanced bitterness and complexity on the palate, with a refreshing finish. Ideal for fans of strong, hoppy beers.

beers_flavors.smell: Citrus, hops, grapefruit, lime, passion fruit, malt, yeast, exotic fruit, herbaceous.
beers_flavors.taste: Powerful, round, generous, dry, fruity notes, citrus, tropical fruit, powerful bitterness, herbaceous
beers_flavors.visual: Clear, golden blond color, creamy white foam.

name: Rodenbach
description: Rodenbach is a Belgian red-brown beer known for its unique, tangy taste, the result of aging in oak barrels. It offers complex aromas of red fruit, balsamic vinegar and oak.

beers_flavors.smell: Sweet-sour aromas of ripe fruit, caramel and wood
beers_flavors.taste: Sweet and tangy, sweet-sour notes, ripe fruit, caramelized malt, plum, cherry, woody
beers_flavors.visual: Ruby color, red highlights, thick off-white foam

name: Grimbergen
description: Grimbergen Blonde is a well-balanced Belgian abbey beer, with fruity and slightly spicy aromas. Its smooth, malty flavor and slight bitterness make it a very pleasant beer to drink.

beers_flavors.taste: Sweet, Slightly bitter, Malty, Balanced, Roundness
beers_flavors.visual: Golden, Clear, Fine mousse, Delicate bubbles

name: Galipette Cider
description: Farmhouse charm with modern elegance. Starting with the finest local cider apples, Galipette ferments and matures cider in line with the centuries-old traditions of northwest France. Their range of dry ciders celebrate freshness in every crisp, delicious sip.

beers_flavors.taste: Fruity, Sweet, Acidic, Balanced
beers_flavors.visual: Gold, Clear, Sparkling

name: Trotinette 0.0%
description: Delicious organic Belgian beer, full of flavor, divinely light, with citrus notes and only 0.4% alcohol, it's the result of an innovative union of four malts and four hops. Slightly fizzy, refreshing, but still the same flavor as its traditional alcoholic version.

beers_flavors.taste: Slightly bitter, Sweat, Refreshing
beers_flavors.visual: Pale Gold, Clear, Light foam

name: FOSDEM Beer 2025
description: FOSDEM Beer 2025 is a Belgian craft beer with a strong character. It offers intense hop aromas with hints of citrus and tropical fruit. Its flavor is well balanced between bitterness and sweetness, making every sip refreshing.

beers_flavors.taste: Bitter, Fruity, Balanced, Refreshing
beers_flavors.visual: Golden, Clear, Dense foam
